name: Ensembl REST API
description: The Ensembl REST API (v15.12) provides language-agnostic HTTP access to genome annotation data across hundreds of vertebrate and eukaryotic species. It exposes 19 endpoint categories covering genome sequences, gene and transcript lookups, variant effect prediction (VEP), comparative genomics (gene trees, homology, alignments), coordinate mapping between assemblies, regulatory features, linkage disequilibrium, ontology and taxonomy queries, phenotype annotations, and GA4GH-compliant genomic data access.

offers.description: Free public access, no authentication required

potentialAction.name: Get Archive by ID
potentialAction.description: Uses the given identifier to return its latest version

potentialAction.name: Post Archive IDs
potentialAction.description: Retrieve the stable IDs for multiple identifiers

hasPart.name: Comparative Genomics Endpoints
hasPart.description: Gene trees, homology, and genomic alignments

potentialAction.name: Get Cafe Gene Tree
potentialAction.description: Retrieves a cafe tree of the gene tree using the gene tree stable identifier

potentialAction.name: Get Cafe Gene Tree by Symbol
potentialAction.description: Retrieves the cafe tree of the gene tree that contains the gene identified by a symbol

potentialAction.name: Get Cafe Gene Tree by Species ID
potentialAction.description: Retrieves the cafe tree of the gene tree that contains the gene/transcript/translation stable identifier in the given species

potentialAction.name: Get Gene Tree
potentialAction.description: Retrieves a gene tree for a gene tree stable identifier

potentialAction.name: Get Gene Tree by Symbol
potentialAction.description: Retrieves the gene tree that contains the gene identified by a symbol

potentialAction.name: Get Gene Tree by Species ID
potentialAction.description: Retrieves the gene tree that contains the gene/transcript/translation stable identifier in the given species

potentialAction.name: Get Genomic Alignment by Region
potentialAction.description: Retrieves genomic alignments as separate blocks based on a region and species

potentialAction.name: Get Homology by ID
potentialAction.description: Retrieves homology information (orthologs) by species and Ensembl gene id

potentialAction.name: Get Homology by Symbol
potentialAction.description: Retrieves homology information (orthologs) by symbol

potentialAction.name: Get XRefs by Symbol
potentialAction.description: Looks up an external symbol and returns all Ensembl objects linked to it

potentialAction.name: Get XRefs by ID
potentialAction.description: Perform lookups of Ensembl Identifiers and retrieve their external references in other databases

potentialAction.name: Get XRefs by Name
potentialAction.description: Performs a lookup based upon the primary accession or display label of an external reference

hasPart.name: Information Endpoints
hasPart.description: Metadata about available data, species, assemblies, and compara databases

potentialAction.name: Get Species Analysis
potentialAction.description: List the names of analyses involved in generating Ensembl data

potentialAction.name: Get Assembly Info
potentialAction.description: List the currently available assemblies for a species, along with toplevel sequences, chromosomes and cytogenetic bands

potentialAction.name: Get Assembly Stats by Region
potentialAction.description: Returns information about the specified toplevel sequence region for the given species

potentialAction.name: Get Biotypes
potentialAction.description: List the functional classifications of gene models that Ensembl associates with a particular species

potentialAction.name: Get Compara Methods
potentialAction.description: List all compara analyses available

potentialAction.name: Get Compara Species Sets
potentialAction.description: List all collections of species analysed with the specified compara method

potentialAction.name: Get External Databases
potentialAction.description: Lists all available external sources for a species

potentialAction.name: Get Ensembl Divisions
potentialAction.description: Get list of all Ensembl divisions for which information is available

potentialAction.name: Get Genome Info
potentialAction.description: Find information about a given genome

potentialAction.name: Get Species List
potentialAction.description: Lists all available species, their aliases, available adaptor groups and data release

potentialAction.name: Get Variation Sources
potentialAction.description: List the variation sources used in Ensembl for a species

hasPart.name: Linkage Disequilibrium Endpoints
hasPart.description: LD data for variants in human populations

potentialAction.name: Get LD for Variant
potentialAction.description: Computes and returns LD values between the given variant and all other variants in a window centered around the given variant

potentialAction.name: Get LD for Region
potentialAction.description: Computes and returns LD values between all pairs of variants in the defined region

potentialAction.name: Get LD for Variant Pair
potentialAction.description: Computes and returns LD values between the given variants

hasPart.name: Lookup Endpoints
hasPart.description: Look up identifiers and symbols for genes, transcripts, and translations

potentialAction.name: Lookup by ID
potentialAction.description: Find the species and database for a single identifier e.g. gene, transcript, protein

potentialAction.name: Lookup Multiple IDs
potentialAction.description: Find the species and database for several identifiers

potentialAction.name: Lookup by Symbol
potentialAction.description: Find the species and database for a symbol in a linked external database

potentialAction.name: Lookup Multiple Symbols
potentialAction.description: Find the species and database for a set of symbols in a linked external database

hasPart.name: Mapping Endpoints
hasPart.description: Map coordinates between assemblies and from CDNA/CDS/protein to genome

potentialAction.name: Map Assembly Coordinates
potentialAction.description: Convert the co-ordinates of one assembly to another

potentialAction.name: Map CDNA to Genome
potentialAction.description: Convert from cDNA coordinates to genomic coordinates

potentialAction.name: Map CDS to Genome
potentialAction.description: Convert from CDS coordinates to genomic coordinates

potentialAction.name: Map Protein to Genome
potentialAction.description: Given a protein ID, position and allele, return the genomic change(s)

hasPart.name: Ontology and Taxonomy Endpoints
hasPart.description: Gene Ontology annotations and NCBI taxonomy queries

potentialAction.name: Get Ontology by ID
potentialAction.description: Search for an ontological term by its namespaced identifier

potentialAction.name: Get Ontology by Name
potentialAction.description: Search for a list of ontological terms by their name

potentialAction.name: Get Ontology Ancestors
potentialAction.description: Reconstruct the entire ancestry of a term from is_a and part_of relationships

potentialAction.name: Get Taxonomy by ID
potentialAction.description: Search for a taxonomic term by its identifier or name

potentialAction.name: Get Taxonomy Classification
potentialAction.description: Return the taxonomic classification of a taxon node

hasPart.name: Overlap Endpoints
hasPart.description: Retrieve features overlapping a genomic region

potentialAction.name: Get Overlap by ID
potentialAction.description: Retrieves features (e.g. genes, transcripts, variants and more) that overlap a region defined by the given identifier

potentialAction.name: Get Overlap by Region
potentialAction.description: Retrieves multiple types of features for a given region

potentialAction.name: Get Overlap by Translation
potentialAction.description: Retrieve features related to a specific Translation as described by its stable ID

potentialAction.name: Get Phenotype by Accession
potentialAction.description: Return phenotype annotations for genomic features given a phenotype ontology accession

potentialAction.name: Get Phenotype by Gene
potentialAction.description: Return phenotype annotations for a given gene

potentialAction.name: Get Phenotype by Region
potentialAction.description: Return phenotype annotations that overlap a given genomic region

potentialAction.name: Get Phenotype by Term
potentialAction.description: Return phenotype annotations for genomic features given a phenotype ontology term

hasPart.name: Regulatory Endpoints
hasPart.description: Regulatory features and activity across cell types

potentialAction.name: Get Regulatory Feature
potentialAction.description: Returns a RegulatoryFeature given its stable ID

potentialAction.name: List Epigenomes
potentialAction.description: Returns the list of epigenomes available for the given species

hasPart.name: Sequence Endpoints
hasPart.description: Genomic, transcript, and protein sequence retrieval

potentialAction.name: Get Sequence by ID
potentialAction.description: Request multiple types of biological sequences based on the input identifier

potentialAction.name: Get Multiple Sequences by ID
potentialAction.description: Request multiple types of biological sequences based on multiple input identifiers

potentialAction.name: Get Sequence by Region
potentialAction.description: Returns the genomic sequence of the specified region of the given species

potentialAction.name: Get Multiple Sequences by Region
potentialAction.description: Returns the genomic sequence of multiple regions of the given species

potentialAction.name: Get Transcript Haplotypes
potentialAction.description: Computes observed transcript haplotype sequences based on phased genotype data

hasPart.name: Variant Effect Prediction (VEP) Endpoints
hasPart.description: Predict functional consequences of variants on genes, transcripts, and proteins

potentialAction.name: VEP by HGVS
potentialAction.description: Fetch variant consequences based on a HGVS notation

potentialAction.name: VEP by ID
potentialAction.description: Fetch variant consequences based on a variant identifier

potentialAction.name: VEP by Region
potentialAction.description: Fetch variant consequences based on a region in VCF format

potentialAction.name: VEP Multiple by HGVS
potentialAction.description: Fetch variant consequences for multiple HGVS notations

potentialAction.name: VEP Multiple by ID
potentialAction.description: Fetch variant consequences for multiple variant identifiers

potentialAction.name: VEP Multiple by Region
potentialAction.description: Fetch variant consequences for multiple regions/alleles in VCF format

potentialAction.name: Get Variant by ID
potentialAction.description: Uses a variant identifier to return the variation features including optional genotype, phenotype and population data

potentialAction.name: Get Multiple Variants by ID
potentialAction.description: Uses a list of variant identifiers to return the variation features

potentialAction.name: Get PMCID Variants
potentialAction.description: Retrieve variants associated with a PubMed Central article

potentialAction.name: Get PMID Variants
potentialAction.description: Retrieve variants associated with a PubMed article

hasPart.name: GA4GH Endpoints
hasPart.description: Global Alliance for Genomics and Health (GA4GH) compliant genomic data access endpoints

potentialAction.name: GA4GH Beacon
potentialAction.description: Determine if a SNP exists in a collection of variants

potentialAction.name: GA4GH Beacon Query
potentialAction.description: Return information about the Ensembl Beacon for the GA4GH Beacon protocol

potentialAction.name: GA4GH Search Call Sets
potentialAction.description: Return a list of call sets in GA4GH format

potentialAction.name: GA4GH Get Call Set
potentialAction.description: Return the call set corresponding to an id

potentialAction.name: GA4GH Search Datasets
potentialAction.description: Return a list of datasets in GA4GH format

potentialAction.name: GA4GH Get Dataset
potentialAction.description: Return the dataset corresponding to an id

potentialAction.name: GA4GH Search Features
potentialAction.description: Return a list of features in GA4GH format

potentialAction.name: GA4GH Get Feature
potentialAction.description: Return the feature corresponding to an id

potentialAction.name: GA4GH Search References
potentialAction.description: Return a list of reference sequences in GA4GH format

potentialAction.name: GA4GH Get Reference
potentialAction.description: Return information about a single reference sequence

potentialAction.name: GA4GH Search Reference Sets
potentialAction.description: Return a list of reference sets in GA4GH format

potentialAction.name: GA4GH Get Reference Set
potentialAction.description: Return information about a single reference set

potentialAction.name: GA4GH Search Variants
potentialAction.description: Return variant call information in GA4GH format for a region on a reference sequence

potentialAction.name: GA4GH Get Variant
potentialAction.description: Return the variant corresponding to an id

potentialAction.name: GA4GH Search Variant Annotations
potentialAction.description: Return variant annotation information in GA4GH format for a region on a reference sequence

potentialAction.name: GA4GH Search Variant Annotation Sets
potentialAction.description: Return a list of variant annotation sets in GA4GH format

potentialAction.name: GA4GH Get Variant Annotation Set
potentialAction.description: Return the variant annotation set corresponding to an id

potentialAction.name: GA4GH Search Variant Sets
potentialAction.description: Return a list of variant sets in GA4GH format

potentialAction.name: GA4GH Get Variant Set
potentialAction.description: Return the variant set corresponding to an id
